question.question_text: What will the USD/CHF exchange rate be on 2026-03-26 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: The point estimate assumes a random walk for the highly liquid USD/CHF pair over a single day, hence it is set to the current rate. Confidence intervals are calculated based on typical historical daily volatility for USD/CHF (estimated at 0.0035 absolute standard deviation), using z-scores for a normal distribution.
